emails.subject: Upcoming Seminars
emails.body: Upcoming Seminars Tana: I have asked Suzanne to reserve the following dates for the big conference room on 30 for our upcoming lunch seminars: Friday, May 5th, Thursday, May 25th and Friday, June 16th. Sara and I are going to try and set something up with the weather group for the May 5th date if that works for them. Can we plan on scheduleing something with the confirms group and the global contracts group for the other 2 dates? Sara and I need to talk about what to do with the credit group. Carol

emails.subject: Re: Upcoming Seminars
emails.body: Re: Upcoming Seminars No conflict with me. I sent the date of the 24th to Anthony and asked him to confirm it with his people and get back to me.
